data.title: Hang Seng Gold ETF Launches on Hong Kong Exchange with Bank Redemption Option
data.description:
Hang Seng Gold ETF debuts on Hong Kong Exchange, offering bank redemption for investors. Plans include tokenized shares, launching in 2026.
source: https://coincu.com/news/hang-seng-gold-etf-bank-redemption/

data.title: FBI seizes domain of RAMP underground hacking forum
data.description:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has seized the clearnet and darkweb domains of the RAMP underground platform. The RAMP platform serves as a hacking forum and caters to several groups involved in Ransomware-as-a-Service and other cybercriminals. While the FBI has yet to issue an official statement to that effect, the domains used by the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fbi-seizes-domain-of-ramp-underground/

data.title: Hang Seng Gold ETF Listed: First Physical Redemption Option in Hong Kong
data.description:
Hang Seng Gold ETF debuts on HK exchange, offering first physical redemption.
source: https://coincu.com/news/hang-seng-gold-etf-launch/

data.title: Significant INX Transfer to Jump Crypto Observed
data.description: A substantial transfer of INX tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 18:56, 150 million INX tokens were moved from an anonymous address, beginning with 0xa7cc, to Jump Crypto.

data.title: A wallet withdrew nearly $29 million worth of HYPE from a CEX over the past three days and transferred it to multiple wallets for staking.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, a wallet withdrew approximately 958,700 HYPE tokens from OKX and Bybit over the past three days, worth nearly $29 million. These tokens were then immediately split into multiple wallets and staked. Industry insiders speculate that this may have been a buy-and-stake operation by Flowdesk on behalf of Hyperliquid Strategies (DAT).

data.title: Crypto trader loses over $12 million in ‘painful’ mistake
data.description:
A cryptocurrency trader has lost more than $12 million worth of Ethereum (ETH) after mistakenly sending funds to a fraudulent wallet address, in what blockchain data suggests was a successful address-poisoning attack. On-chain records show the victim address, identified as 0xd674, had an established pattern of transferring large sums of ETH to a Galaxy Digital deposit wallet, according to insights shared by Lookonchain on January 31. A victim (0xd674) lost 4556 $ETH($12.4M) due to a copy-paste address mistake
source: https://finbold.com/crypto-trader-loses-over-12-million-in-painful-mistake/

data.title: CZ: I will try to avoid commenting on the topic of "Binance needing to be responsible for the 1011 crash".
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that he will try to refrain from commenting on the "Binance needs to be held accountable for the 1011 crash" topic, stating that the data speaks for itself and that the timeline contradicts the truth. He is pleased to see people beginning to understand the facts. Let others talk; he will focus on his work from now on. There is still much work to be done.

data.title: Coinbase Insider Trading Lawsuit Advances Despite $2.9B Stock Sale Defense
data.description:
A Delaware judge ruled that a shareholder lawsuit alleging insider trading by Coinbase directors including Marc Andreessen and Brian Armstrong can proceed despite a 10-month internal investigation clearing the defendants, citing conflicts involving a special committee member that reviewed $2. 9 billion in stock sales during the company's 2021 direct listing.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-insider-trading-lawsuit-advances-despite-2-9b-stock-sale-defense/

data.title: Dragonfly's partner refuted the claim that "Binance + Ethena caused the crash on October 11th," suggesting it was more likely due to a combination of systemic failures.
data.description: Haseeb Qureshi, Managing Partner of Dragonfly, commented on recent claims that the October 11th market crash was triggered by Binance and Ethena, stating that this narrative is untenable in terms of timeline, market propagation path, and evidence. He pointed out that Bitcoin's price bottomed out approximately 30 minutes before the USDe anomaly on Binance, clearly reversing the causal relationship. Furthermore, the USDe price deviation occurred only on Binance and did not spread to other exchanges, failing to explain the large-scale liquidation across the entire market, and is fundamentally different from events like Terra that caused global balance sheet shocks. Haseeb believes a more reasonable explanation is the confluence of multiple factors: Trump's tariff remarks disrupted the market on Friday night, the Binance API anomaly prevented market makers from cross-platform hedging, liquidation and ADL mechanisms amplified volatility, and the crypto market lacks traditional financial circuit breakers and self-stabilizing mechanisms, ultimately causing the market to evolve along an unfavorable path. He emphasized that there was no single, simple, and conspiratorial "culprit" behind 10/11. Although the market suffered a severe blow, it was not permanently damaged in the long run and only needs time to restore liquidity and confidence.

data.title: India's National Stock Exchange Plans IPO Within Eight Months
data.description:
India's National Stock Exchange (NSE) is preparing to launch its initial public offering (IPO) within the next seven to eight months, according to CNBC-TV18. According to Jin10, the exchange has received approval from market regulators and is currently drafting its red herring prospectus. Ashish Kumar Chauhan, the CEO of NSE, stated that the document preparation is expected to take around four months, followed by an additional two to three months to obtain regulatory approval and officially launch the IPO.

The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) approved the plan this week, nearly a decade after the exchange first submitted its IPO application in 2016. The plan was previously delayed due to concerns raised by regulators over corporate governance issues and alleged unfair market access. To address related lawsuits, NSE has submitted two settlement applications totaling 12.97 billion rupees (approximately $141 million).

data.title: Trader Benson: Binance bears responsibility for the 10/11 attacks, but USDe was not the core cause.
data.description: Trader Benson commented on the market volatility of October 11th, stating that while Binance does bear some responsibility, the core issue is not with USDe. He pointed out that, chronologically, when the market reached its lowest point at 5:20, USDe only experienced a slight decoupling. The real drop to 0.65 occurred at 5:54, about 30 minutes after the market began its rebound, indicating that USDe's extreme decoupling was more of a secondary consequence of the volatility than the direct cause of the crash. Benson further analyzed that the real anomaly lay in the large-scale price discrepancies between Binance and other exchanges between 5:18 and 5:20. On that day, more than half of the cryptocurrencies experienced their lowest prices across the entire market on Binance, with some deviations reaching 50% or even 100%. Furthermore, USDT trading pairs for the same cryptocurrencies were significantly lower than USD trading pairs, something unprecedented in previous black swan events. They believe that, in retrospect, the problem is more likely to be at the system level of Binance, rather than simply caused by market makers withdrawing liquidity. They also call for the industry to have a more thorough and open discussion of the incident, taking advantage of Binance's recap.

data.title: WisdomTree Crypto AUM Holds $2.24B as Tokenization Accelerates
data.description:
WisdomTree reported $2. 24 billion in crypto assets under management (AUM) as of December 31, 2025, according to its Q4 earnings release on January 30, 2026. While crypto AUM declined from nearly $3. 2 billion at the start of the quarter due to market-driven valuation changes, the figure still represents a clear increase from the $1
source: https://www.ethnews.com/wisdomtree-crypto-aum-holds-2-24b-as-tokenization-accelerates/

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations are poised to impact liquidation levels significantly. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $2,777, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on major centralized exchanges will reach $1.224 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,516, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions will amount to $497 million.

data.title: When He Yi released content related to Moltbook, the Base ecosystem token MOLT surged 30% in a short period, pushing its market capitalization above $100 million.
data.description: He Yi posted content related to Mltbook on social media, stating, "We are watching AI, and AI is watching us as well," along with a link to the Mltbook website. Influenced by this post, the Base Chain ecosystem token MOLT briefly surged by approximately 30%, with its market capitalization briefly exceeding $100 million, before currently settling back to approximately $94.1 million. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: CZ Pushes Back on Claims Binance Triggered Historic $19B Crypto Liquidations
data.description:
Changpeng Zhao, widely known as CZ, has rejected allegations that Binance played a central role in the largest liquidation event in crypto market history.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cz-pushes-back-on-claims-binance-triggered-historic-19b-crypto-liquidations/

data.title: The whale "pfm.eth" deposited 5 million USDC into Hyperliquid to go long on silver.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, whale "pfm.eth" has deposited 5 million USDC into Hyperliquid to go long on silver. He has opened a 1x leveraged long position with 17,305 xyz:SILVER (worth approximately $1.49 million), and there are also approximately $1.66 million in limit buy orders waiting to be filled.

data.title: Hong Kong Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury: Hang Seng Gold ETF will explore distribution through licensed digital asset trading platforms.
data.description: The Hang Seng Gold ETF has been listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, becoming Hong Kong's first physical gold ETF that allows individual investors to redeem directly from banks. At the 19th Asian Financial Forum (AFF) in Hong Kong, Christopher Hui, Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, stated that in addition to offering the option to redeem physical gold at banks, the Hang Seng Gold ETF is also planned for distribution through licensed digital asset trading platforms. According to Lee Pui-shan, Director and CEO of Hang Seng Investment Management, the tokenized unlisted class of the Hang Seng Gold ETF is currently in its final testing phase and is expected to launch in the first quarter of 2026. The tokenized class will also be open to retail investors, with a lower entry fee expected. Currently, only US dollar-denominated shares are available, but this class will not offer a physical gold redemption option. (Caixin)

data.title: Musk said he had repeatedly turned down Epstein's offers.
data.description: In a response to community users on the X platform, Musk stated that he was "well aware that some of his email correspondence with Jeffrey Epstein could be misinterpreted and used to smear his reputation." He also stated that no one had worked harder than him to push for the release of Epstein-related documents, and he was pleased that these documents had finally been disclosed. Musk stated that he had very little communication with Epstein and had repeatedly declined invitations to visit his private island or ride the "Lolita Express." He added that his focus was on the United States prosecuting those who committed serious crimes with Epstein.

data.title: "I'm coming!" saw its market capitalization surpass $40 million, with a 24-hour increase of 37.09%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of "I'm Here" has exceeded $40 million, currently trading at $41.13 million, a 37.09% increase in the first half of the year. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.
